tissue: The replication machinery of the severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) is closely associated with the endoplasmic reticulum (ER) in host cells.
disease_state: Targeting ORF8-involved mixed disulfide complexes could be a new strategy to alleviate SARS-CoV-2 induced ER stress and related diseases.
sample_source: Our experimental data showed that ORF8 protein was identified only in the cell lysate fraction but not detectable in the culture medium when ectopically expressed in HEK 293T, HepG2, HeLa or Vero E6 cells.
cell_line: Our experimental data showed that ORF8 protein was identified only in the cell lysate fraction but not detectable in the culture medium when ectopically expressed in HEK 293T, HepG2, HeLa or Vero E6 cells.
